subject: fix(ux): make variability labels work for both income and expenses
body:
The "Buy when needed" label and tooltip only made sense for expenses.
Renamed to "No set schedule" and made all tooltips context-aware using
isIncome() — shows income examples (salary, freelance gigs) for positive
amounts and expense examples (rent, prepaid electricity) for negative.

Tags: ux, import
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: variable-recurring-expenses
Semver: patch
